rightsPolicy.notes: Store external source/photo-set links in grow data. Do not copy, cache, upload, or rehost third-party photos unless GrowPathAI has permission from the rightsholder.

acceptanceChecks: Free user can view feed banners and use allowed grow/log flows without commercial inventory.
Pro user can save tool runs, logs, tasks, and external photo metadata.

packs.title: Tomatoes Sunviva / Primabella Outdoor
growPathAIFeaturesTested: soil nutrient batch linked to product workflows
public storefront discovery and similar brand navigation
ad and external link click analytics

cropTrial.measurementPlan: germination, propagation, transplanting, hardening, input comparison, supplier issues, harvest count, recovery tracking

transplantEvent.notes: Transplanted into 2 L pots from rootbound 0.5 L pots.

outsideTrial.notes: Extra plants tested outside in 30 L pots.

hardeningEvents.notes: Plants placed outside on sunny days.

harvestEvents.notes: First Sunviva tomatoes ripe and harvested.

soilPerformanceComparison.notes: Sonnerde soil outperforming Neudorff so far.
Strong difference between Sonnerde and Neudorff soil; Neudorff plants lagging.

recoveryObservations.notes: Plants greener, stems thicker, new flowers appearing after fertilizer.

acceptanceChecks: Commercial user can create a non-cannabis crop batch.
Commercial grow workspace supports cultivar comparison for Sunviva and Primabella.
Germination, propagation, transplanting, hardening, input comparison, supplier notes, harvest count, and recovery tracking are represented.
External photo links remain source metadata and are not copied into GrowPathAI assets.

packs.title: MAC1 FloraFlex - 8 Plant Clone Batch
growPathAIFeaturesTested: harvest crew and room reset task workflow

weeklyLogs.cloneSelectionNotes: 16 clones taken, 8 most uniform selected. Rockwool cube start.

flushEvents.notes: Flushed with flower nutrients before flip

weeklyLogs.cropSteeringAdjustment: Reduced CO2 and light to avoid foxtail/transpiration imbalance.

runoffCorrection.note: Runoff flushed from over 2000 ppm toward 1500 ppm.

irrigationSchedule.note: 1 gal/plant/day, 3 min x 5 feeds during lights on.

dryRoom.note: Dry tent around 60% RH target, 65°F/55% ambient noted.

acceptanceChecks: Facility users can access room/task workflows by role.
Facility crop summary links grow, room, task, harvest, and dry/cure records.
Post-harvest quality notes are visible in reports without becoming public storefront content.
Facility and commercial workflows stay separate unless explicitly linked.
